title: Agentic Platform Intelligence
description: Deploys a fleet of domain-specialized AI agents as first-class platform features. Includes: AI set recommendations engine, cross-user set sharing, agentic development organization for continuous platform improvement.

agentic_org.description: Specialized agent roles deployed as persistent platform services

agents.name: Sonic Analyst
agents.domain: Audio analysis, BPM detection, key analysis, mood/energy profiling
agents.llm_routing: Uses claude-sonnet-4-6 via LLM.Router with tool: analyze_audio_features

agents.name: Set Curator
agents.domain: PerformanceSet curation, set quality scoring, Chef supervision
agents.llm_routing: Uses claude-opus-4-6 for high-quality curation decisions

agents.name: Mix Advisor
agents.domain: DJ set flow optimization, track ordering, energy curve planning
agents.llm_routing: Uses claude-sonnet-4-6 with music theory context

agents.name: Stem Engineer
agents.domain: Stem quality assessment, DAW edit suggestions, arrangement optimization

agents.name: Platform Ops
agents.domain: Error monitoring, performance profiling, automated issue triage
agents.llm_routing: Uses claude-haiku-4-5 for cost-efficient ops monitoring

stories.title: AgentRunner GenServer + agent registry
stories.description: Create SoundForge.Agents.AgentRunner GenServer that manages long-running agent tasks. Agents are registered by id, triggered via PubSub events, and their outputs are persisted to an agent_outputs ETS table. Uses existing LLM.Router for model dispatch.
acceptance_criteria: Agents can be triggered via SoundForge.Agents.trigger/2
SonicAnalyst produces mix compatibility score for two tracks
Agent outputs stored and retrievable via AgentRegistry.get_output/2

stories.title: AI Set Recommendations in DJ tab
stories.description: Add 'AI Suggest' button to DJ tab that triggers SetCurator agent. Shows streaming suggestions as they arrive via PubSub. Each suggestion shows confidence score, item type, and one-click add to current set.
acceptance_criteria: AI Suggest button visible in DJ tab
Suggestions stream in as agent produces them
Each suggestion has Add button that creates a cue point
Agent respects existing manual cues (no duplicates within 500ms)

stories.title: Set sharing: publish to community library
stories.description: Users can publish PerformanceSets to a community library. Adds is_public flag to performance_sets table. Public sets visible in a community feed at /sets. Sets attributed to track title and genre tags (from analysis data).
acceptance_criteria: Publish button in Set Library with privacy confirmation
Public sets visible at /sets for all authenticated users
Sets filterable by genre, BPM range, source
Import from community set creates local copy

stories.title: MixAdvisor: energy flow planning for playlists
stories.description: In CrateDigger, add Mix Plan feature powered by MixAdvisor agent. Analyzes all tracks in the crate, suggests optimal play order based on BPM progression, key compatibility, and energy curve. Outputs an ordered track list with transition notes.
acceptance_criteria: MixAdvisor produces ordered track list with BPM transitions
Energy flow diagram shown as canvas visualization
Apply Order resequences the crate playlist
Key compatibility shown as color-coded matrix
